functions.name: show_live_match_updates
functions.docstring: Fetch live match status and display in a visually appealing way.

functions.name: explain_decision
functions.docstring: Provide an explanation for a given decision.

functions.name: analyze_player
functions.docstring:
Analyze a player's performance based on their stats.
This is a placeholder implementation.

functions.name: optimize_team
functions.docstring: Optimize the team based on player stats.

functions.name: get_live_match_status
functions.docstring: Fetch live match status.

functions.name: get_live_match_status
functions.docstring: Fetch live match status using the API client.

functions.name: parse_player_stats
functions.docstring: Parse raw player stats into a structured format.

functions.name: get_banter
functions.docstring: Returns a random banter response based on personality.

functions.name: handle_banter
functions.docstring: Handle banter based on user input and personality mode.

functions.name: get_random_question
functions.docstring: Returns a random question from the given difficulty level.

functions.name: check_answer
functions.docstring: Checks if the user's answer is correct (case-insensitive match).

functions.name: format_question
functions.docstring: Returns a formatted version of the trivia question.

functions.name: get_trivia_question
functions.docstring: Return a random trivia question.

functions.name: cache_data
functions.docstring: Cache data with a specific key.

functions.name: get_cached_data
functions.docstring: Retrieve cached data by key.

functions.name: clear_cache
functions.docstring: Clear all cached data.

functions.name: subscribe
functions.docstring: Subscribe a user to live notifications.

functions.name: unsubscribe
functions.docstring: Unsubscribe a user from live notifications.

functions.name: send_notification
functions.docstring: Send notification to a subscribed user.

functions.name: send_live_update_once
functions.docstring: Send a single live update to all subscribers (for testing).

functions.name: start_live_updates
functions.docstring: Start live updates by sending notifications at specified intervals.

functions.name: handle_error
functions.docstring: Handle errors and return a user-friendly message.

functions.name: setup_logging
functions.docstring: Setup logging configuration.

functions.name: validate_player_id
functions.docstring: Validate if the player ID is in the correct format.

functions.name: validate_api_key
functions.docstring: Validate if the API key is in the correct format.
